name: Soren
description:
🎊 || Your dad recently got remarried, but you never wanted a new mom, and you definitely didn't want some asshole older brother to share your space with. You tried your best to sabotage their marriage, but all it got you was being forced to spend the next 3 months alone with your new step brother while your dad and step mom went to the Bahamas for a couples retreat

TW: Noncon, somnophilia

Thank you guys for 38k and 39k :) Here's a somno stepbro bot to celebrate heheh

Someone on curious cat asked me to make another bot. I've been a bit busy but this was the perfect way to procrastinate I guess. I've been gone for a bit because uni has been busy since the school year is coming to a close, but I'll definitely be posting much more often after this week! I know I still need to do the may showers event, trust me I haven't forgotten about it! It'll definitely get done, and I'll definitely participate in this months event!
In terms of priority of unfinished series:

1- The beginning event
2- May showers/april flowers

3- The zodiac series I've put off since last year LMFAOOO

4- Extras for the heartbreak haven series

5- Cherryville series/cherryhub series (I'm doing them both regardless I just can't decide which to do first)

I wanted to say a couple things, so just skip past this part if you don't want to read :)

I saw the reddit post about me and I wanted to say thank you guys!!! You're all so sweet and it makes me so happy that I make content that so many people enjoy, even if it is fucked up and strange. It's so crazy to me that I have 39k followers now, but I love and appreciate you all very much! I'm not a celebrity or anything, so don't be scared to talk to me! It seems like thats been a common sentiment coming up but if you want to be friends or something just dm me or join my server so we can talk.

Also, it seems like theres been some concerns about me being bullied off of here, rest assured that will never happen (some people just fell to their knees in anguish LMFAO) if anything the hateful comments make me want to post more just to be spiteful <3 the only way I'll stop is when I genuinely don't want to do it anymore.

Just as a general warning for newcomers, my content is fucked up. The majority of the bots I make are sick, and I'd advise you to run away from anyone who reminds you of them irl. Luckily, my bots are just that, bots. They're not real. Please don't let some virtue signaler make you feel bad for using my content (I'm looking at you miss girl on the reddit post you know who you are.)

Also in my comments lately it seems like theres been some weird controversy about me deleting comments lmfao so for the people who ask, I absolutely delete comments. If you're leaving nasty comments, tell me to kill myself, lecturing me about how disgusting/immoral my content is, leaving bigoted comments, or just being annoying your comment will be deleted and you will be blocked. You don't get to turn my own page into a platform where you can harass and chastise me while you sit on some weird moral high ground. It is deeply strange to whine about not being able to disturb my peace on my own page! You are weird and you need to leave me alone.

With that being said, I love constructive criticism! I'm always open to hearing ways in which I can improve, but comments like "I don't like this kind of content" are annoying and unhelpful. Anyways, regardless it's all love <3

Like usual, I'm sorry if the bot speaks for you, repeats, or misgenders you, theres nothing that I can do about it unfortunately, sometimes the LLM is just in a silly goofy mood
creator: CherryFiles
